name: Lethal Layers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a food processor, combine the first three ingredients with a metal blade until crumbly. This can also be done using two knives or a pastry cutter.
3. Pat the mixture into a buttered 9x13-inch pan.
4. Bake for 10 minutes and cool.
5. When the crust is cool, spread the pecans evenly over the surface.
6. Beat the eggs with brown sugar until thick. Add vanilla extract.
7. Put salt and baking powder in a 1/4-cup measure; fill the rest of the measure with flour.
8. Stir the flour mixture into the egg mixture.
9. Pour over the crust and sprinkle chocolate chips evenly over the top.
10. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes or until the center is baked. Cool, then cut into 32 pieces.
Makes 32 bars.
